goal: Token optimization through proportional effort and cheap-first execution.
stop_rules: do not verify the same claim through multiple surfaces unless stakes justify it
stop after the first likely low-stakes diagnosis
do not rerun work for duplicate queued messages
direct user messages pre-empt background smoke tests, evals, and diagnostics

hook_points.purpose: Map the user request to task class and budget before tool use.
Expose first-pass ceilings and browser policy to the tool layer.
Prefer search, snippets, and API checks before browser work.
Ensure live user turns pre-empt noisy background jobs.
Make budget escalation explicit when the cheap path is insufficient.

required_skill_markers: max 2 tool calls on first pass
Direct user messages always pre-empt background smoke tests
required_agents_markers: Answer direct questions in the first sentence.
Search before read, snippet before whole file.
Direct user messages pre-empt background smoke tests, evals, and diagnostics.
